scores.correctness_notes: Covers CLI commands, API polling/wait, and Python client auto-wait correctly. Missing two key items from gold standard: (1) API filtering via `GET /v1/changes?select=in-progress`, and (2) the notices mechanism (`change-update` notice type with long-poll). Also omits the specific change/task structure fields (id, kind, summary, status, ready, spawn-time, ready-time, progress with done/total counters).
scores.hallucination_notes: `PEBBLE_PERSIST=never` environment variable controlling persistence mode is not in the gold standard and appears fabricated. The status lifecycle table (Do/Doing/Done/Error/Hold/Undo/Undoing) is plausible for Pebble but not verified against the gold standard. `change.err` property name and direct `ops.pebble.Client(socket_path)` instantiation pattern are plausible but unverified specifics not mentioned in the gold standard.
